reviews.review_text:
Spent a lovely week on an ensuite site in this park.
The park has lush, grassy sites with mature trees throughout and is meticulously maintained.
Located on Emu Beach, sites close to the beach will hear the waves on the beach.
The ensuite itself was modern, spacious and very clean.
On arrival, reception was friendly and welcoming.
An added bonus for those in the park on a Friday night, is the Community Sports Club, 5 minutes walk up the road, where you can dine in or order a takeaway.
Highly recommend this Big 4.

We stayed for three nights in family cabin no. 8 in mid-May.
The cabin was very spacious, clean and had everything that one would need for a very comfortable and enjoyable stay. It appeared newish and modern.
It was one of the very good cabins that we have stayed in. The caravan park all over looked pretty and well maintained.
I would definitely recommend the place.
Excellent caravan park. Location is brilliant. Booked 2 nights ended up staying 4. Would have stayed even longer if we had time. Will definitely be back.
Excellent caravan park. Very clean and well maintained plus it's barely 100m to the beach.
Can not fault the cleanliness and attention to detail and any assistance asked from staff. Thanks for making our stay wonderful.

Booked this visit a long time ago, basically we made a mistake and chose the wrong park!|However, made the best of it. Unfortunately it went over a long weekend and we were inundated with families with children riding bikes around at all hours even after dark.|The facilities if the park are very good and the sites are quite large, however the laneways are too narrow, so if someone is hooking up the caravan the lane is blocked.|Also we had someone parked opposite us with a boat and trailer.|The price was a bit excessive.
Nice

Lovely caravan and chalet park located at Emu Point. A beautiful part of Albany, about 10-15 minutes from town, and just down to road from Middleton beach.

We stayed in the Deluxe Villas. Spacious and well appointed. Close to the beach. If you're lucky, you'll get to see the local wildlife, a  Bandicoot or the odd rabbit or two.

Great facilities for kids, nice lush grassy areas for caravan and tent sites.

Greated by a very friendly staff member on arrival. As we were setting up another staff member came past to welcome us and check we were ok. Park was very clean and tidy. Toilet and shower blook were very clean. The park full of shade.

We were camping. Some of the nicest ablutions I have experienced at a caravan park. Great proximity to the beach and plenty of fun activities for the kids to do. Sites were well maintained and the park is dog friendly, a big bonus.
Just a fantastic park very clean and well maintained just beautiful

Expensive, but nice location.
Amenities are better suited to young families.
Bought my own van , all the camp kitchens and other buildings are very clean.  Showers have good pressure and well planned so clothes don't get wet

This place is really nice, the kitchen is open and huge, the park is beautiful. People are very kind and friendly.
They sell some things that might be useful so that’s great too, and there’s a waterpark (I think).

So good.
Spent 5 days there.  The room was spotless and the staff was always helpful with a smile on there face. Definitely will recommend them and will be back.

Excellent site with adequate space & well grassed surrounds. Ablutions were good. Clise to beach. Although the playgrounds, water park & other facilities were not for we 76yo travellers, these facilities looked first class.
A fantastic caravan park, everything very clean and well-maintained, lovely pitches. The camp kitchen is large and equipped with everything you need. Showers and toilets are very clean.
Todo perfecto. Lo unico que cambiaria seria el servicio de lavanderia. Seria bueno agregar el pago por medio de tarjeta ya que si no tenes monedas te puede agarrar desprevenido

My husband and I had a one night stay recently and we wish we'd had longer. We were enroute to our final destination of Adelaide.
We had a powered caravan site which was immaculate, together with the surrounds.  The amenities were of a very high standard - clean and tidy. Signage around the site was clear and helpful.
We would happily recommend this site to other travellers, especially those with young families.
Super nice, really clean,
Beautiful
Credit to owners and staff. Greenest  and cleanest Park we have been in. Excellent!!
Top Campingplatz, neue und saubere Sanitär Anlagen. BBQ Stellen, Waschmaschinen und Trockner vorhanden. Ruhige Atmosphäre
Got a great spot for my car & caravan. Easy access in & out. No need for cards
The best place to stay for families
We camped but everthing including bathroom/shower were cleaner than expected! People were friendly:)

We were attracted by the facilities for kids and booked a family apartment.
CABIN
The photos on the website doesnt show how poky and small the cabin was [ In response to Management - for over $300 a night describing this as their Budget cabin is insulting to families seeking AFFORDABLE accommodation it was certainly budget withOUT the pricetag!] (Note the local Hilton was cheaper at the time of booking!). The room with the queen bed you had to squeeze sideways around it, there was not adequate space to place a suitcase beyond hand luggage in either rooms. This meant having to either store in the small lounge, or try and shove in a cupboard or back in car.
The cabin was dark even with lighting and curtains drawn back. Was not inviting nor comfortable. The seating outside was so poky only one person could comfortably sit. The bbq area close by had no where for you to sit and enjoy the surroundings so you basically cooked and went back to your room. We had plans to welcome local family for a meal but it was so small and uncomfortable we ended up eating out more than we had wanted to.

BEDDING
Some of the MOST uncomfortable pillows and beds we have ever experienced in our 20 yrs of travelling. The bunkbeds were small, very old creaky and uncomfortable. As we were interstate travellers we had limited options for travelling with our own pillows and other items.

WIFI
Their advice on Wifi is extremely misleading (likely no fault of staff who continued to peddle wifi is slow due to people staying) its because there are only 2 [NOT MULTIPLE] wifi repeaters in the whole park! There was absolutely no phone reception or wifi in our cabin which meant until we left our cabin we didnt receive calls or msgs (and between us we had Telstra, Optus and Aussiebroadband services!) Gr8 for disconnecting your kids, but no so great trying to make bookings or use internet (and no you shouldnt have to walk to reception each time to use your phone as was the suggestion by park staff!)

Kids facilities
The water park was great and well maintained and such a feature of the park. Our kids enjoyed their time, however we did experience challenges with unsupervised kids particular one tween walking around taking photos of kids threatening to "get them kicked out" for unknown rule violations. The kid refused to delete the photos of kids in swimmers. This is NOT ok. When i tried to find a staff member the reception was busy with checkins and no one in or around the water park area [I DID ATTEMPT TO REPORT]. We ended up leaving the water park area.

Having stayed in other parks locally (cabin and camping) in the area we were very disappointed by the cabin amenities and would not personally rebook to stay.

To top it off my perks membership wasnt applied so i paid full whack. A disappointing stay overall.

We had a wonderful stay at Emu Point Holiday Park and would happily return.The location is excellent — quiet, clean, and right near the beach, which is ideal for families with young children. The beach is calm and safe, perfect for swimming and walksGreat family-friendly place, perfect for families.Staff were friendly and helpful, and the room was spacious enough for a family.

Stayed on the ensuite site. Third year in a row so it's safe to say we enjoy it.
Main issue with the park (as with all caravan parks) is inconsiderate people. Loud music, yelling and screaming until all hours.
Kids love the water park, though it would be nice to have a small paddle pool for the younger kids as older kids get very rough on the slides and barge through people.
Camp kitchen is small and regularly gets completely taken over by one family.

We just had the best experience over Christmas with you guys. The facilities, the staff the beautiful green grass all top notch. The kids said it was their most favourite park over the 5 years we have been caravanning. Can’t wait to come back. Thanks team Emu Beach!
Nice place to stay however wifi didn’t work!

Kudos to all the reception staff who were so friendly and helpful. The kind of people you want to chat to when you're excited to be on holiday!

And also, kudos to the housekeeping and grounds keeping staff. Our cabin was immaculate - and so well stocked with all the things a family needs for a holiday. The grounds were spotless and so well maintained.

You should all be proud of the park and the service you are providing and thank you for facilitating a great family holiday for us.
Beautiful park. Nice caravan bays and amenities.
Well managed campsite, good facilities, dog friendly, helpful staff.
This chalet is quite nice, with a shared theatre, 2 bouncing pillows, a playground and a water playground… The staff were friendly and helpful too :)

My wife and I stayed recently at Emu Beach Caravan Park for four nights. We have been visiting this caravan park for over 20 years. During that time we have seen many changes and got to know 2 sets of owners and the current owners have carried out lots of improvements since taking over the park, but have always kept it as a family caravan park. I feel the way the park is now would be the best it's ever been and the current owners should be very proud of there achievements. My children are all grown up now and my wife and I are retired so we stay during the off season time, but if you are a young family with young children then I strongly recommend you go to Emu Beach Caravan Park, I can assure you and especially your children won't be sorry.
Thankyou to the Management & Staff of Emu Beach Caravan Park my wife and I had another lovely stay at your caravan park and we will definitely be back again.

We have been travelling around Oz for last 12months and this would be the nicest park we have been to
It is super pet friendly love all the tracks leading to dog  beach.
The ablutions and grounds are immaculate.
Reception and grounds staff super friendly and helpful they all do an amazing job.
Caravan sites are very good. Every thing is well presented and maintained.
Ive used a few of these holiday parks now and i have to say i love them, the facilities, the staff, the things do do the locations yheyre all brilliant and amazing value for money

Greeted with a lovely smile, must say it was lovely. Reception lady is a huge asset. Grounds were immaculate and it was easy to find and park on a powered site with a slab. It was wet and cold, but facilities were lovely and clean, plenty of hot water too. WiFi was a little slow, but other than that would stay again happily. Definitely a BIG 4, and more than worthy of the reputation. Loved hearing the waves at night, the wind was up too, but it was very cosy in the van. The kitchen was open, but very sheltered with microwave, hotplate, 2 kettles and a toaster. The sinks were immaculate, only the tables looked grubby, but may have been an earlier group. No utensils or plates there, but most people do have their own. Also they have a small water park! Even though it was close by, it was not too noisy. Kids obvs loved it!
One of the best caravan parks we have stayed in. Concrete slabs for caravans and beautiful lawns. Highly recommend and Janine in reception is very friendly.

Very good campground for families with kids. There's plenty to discover: jumping pillow, a splash park, a pirate ship, table tennis, arcade games, indoor playground, etc. The family bathroom with its huge bathtub and shower is very convenient. The children can bathe while you enjoy a hot shower with good pressure. The beach is just a short walk away, but nothing special.

Absolutely lovely caravan park, well worth the price, fantastic beach to walk along just 3 mins walk away, so much for kids to do (bouncy pillows, water park, mini golf, theatre room, playground, pool tables etc) and lovely grounds and well kept clean amenities. One of the nicest caravan parks we’ve been to in 9 months of travel. Thank you for a lovely stay!

Great setting, with the beach close by, good for kids with lots on offer to entertain. Very attentive and helpful staff - someone came to check if we needed any help settling in. Nice amenities. For us, a retired couple travelling with a big dog - too crowded, with the sites really close together and very full (we thought we'd be ok because it was at the end of school holidays) - so make sure you are well clear of any holidays.

very good caravan park, our chalet was roomy well equipped.  The park was very clean well located near the beach so you could walk to it there were plenty of on site  things for kids to do.  Was close enough to main city Centre if you needed to go there

Wonderful opportunity to enjoy a stay on the beautiful beaches at Emu Point.

Great facilities and services.

Park is clean and tidy.

Entertainment for kids compares to some of the bigger parks on the east coast.

Highly recommended. Book early.

Perfect place to stay, villa was amazing, the grounds are lovely and well kept and amenities are spot on! Our little family with Miss 6 & Miss 3 loved our week long stay here. Definitely recommend! We will be back! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Nice neat park with a short walk along pathway to the beach. Plenty of things  in the park for kids including putt putt golf. About 10 mins from Albany city but easy drive to explore the area.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️☆ We had a lovely stay at this caravan park! The customer service was top-notch—staff were friendly, helpful, and always ready with a smile. The entire park was impressively clean and well-maintained, from the amenities to the grounds, which made for a very comfortable and relaxing experience.||The only downside was the limited food options on-site. While everything else exceeded expectations, having more dining choices or even a small café would have made it perfect. That said, if you're happy to bring your own food or venture out for meals, this place is a fantastic choice for a peaceful getaway.

Setting was pleasant, pity about the wet and cold weather! Reception was friendly and they later took note when we reported the courtesy lights over the male toilets weren't working and they would deal with it.|The roadworks opposite our site made backing in an adventure.|The concrete pad, hmm, would have been a great idea IF it had ben long enough and had not been raised above the surrounding ground. Due to the pad length not being enough our caravan levelling jack was over the grass and then would not extend far enough to enable us to level the caravan. We could not back up further as we were right up against the brick wall at the rear. We had to purchase extra levelling blocks to go under the jack. This is becoming a problem with many caravan parks as they don't cater for longer caravans adequately, it seems. We saw many caravan parks during out 13 week journey, this was one of the better ones.|We would use this park again if even in Albany, but would require a  site with easier access.

A fabulous stay in a superior cabin. These are basically a 2 bedroom house. Very well appointed and very comfortable. A lovely spot to stay and relax. A short walk to the beach and the very good coffee shop at the point.
Very up market well appointed for the kids Very suitable for grey nomads.Very clean and modern
Great location near the sea.  Modern and clean facilities but the poor Wifi was a downer.

We stayed in one of the studio units at Big Emu Holiday Park and absolutely loved it! The facilities are amazing — everything is clean, modern, and well-maintained. The park itself has a great atmosphere, with friendly and respectful families all around, making it a really comfortable place to relax. Perfect spot for couples looking for a peaceful, tidy, and enjoyable getaway. Highly recommend!
Awesome stay! Good size site for the trailer and the sprawl that comes with kids. Will definitely return in the future!

THE BEST place to stay in Albany with kids. The facilities are amazing, grounds well maintained and clean. We stayed in a holiday home and it had everything we needed, it was the perfect family holiday. Walking distance to the beach and great fishing spots, Mermaid Bay is stunning and only a short walk away.
Amazing Splash Water Park, Huge kids jumping pillow, rec room, kids club, movie theatre, nature playground and mini golf, all within the grounds - kids paradise! The kids play all day and meet new friends. During the school holidays they have a movie playing in the theatre every night and kids activities on during the day.
Highly recommended, must book well in advance. We will definitely be back.
2nd time we went back and are planning to return back in 2026
Fantastic park, nice and quiet, close to the beach.  Not far from Albany.   Great water park for the kids and playground area.
We would definitely return and recommend this hotel to families
Very close to amenities, very central location. Close to town and the beach. Loved it
A great quiet park with clean facilities and close to the beach. Very happy staff and very helpful.

It was a Wonderful very relaxing getaway, with beautiful green peppermint trees and lawn everywhere. The park i rhink is kept very tidy. Such a lovely park it also has the best camp kitchen, set out practical and  easy.  At the park they very friendly staff.
Had a powered site here for four nights. Large sites. Extremely well maintained park and excellent amenities which were always spotless.

Had a very enjoyable and relaxing stay and the park facilities were top-notch. The large tree opposite site 5 made backing the van onto the site an interesting challenge. Also the |anhedral sloped concrete slab was unexpected, requiring levelling chocks to be fitted under the roadside tyres.

We absolutely loved our stay here in our caravan.  The reception lady was so welcoming on arrival,  our site was big with a large slab, plenty of room for car and awning.  The amenities blocks are modern and kept spotlessly clean , the grounds are beautifully maintained as well. All staff were so friendly.
We loved our beach walks and short drive into Albany. This park is a credit to owners and managers.

From the moment I walked in, the Reception Nateley was welcoming and professional. She answered all my questions clearly and provided exceptional service throughout the entire process.Kudos!! team Emu Beach Park, Albany WA !!!!

Excellent park, large bays. Facilities were incredible, I think brand new with utmost privacy between, showers, hand basins and toilets. The amenities in the camp kitchen were excellent and as with the amenities block extremely clean. The park was very quiet during the night. Definitely a place to stay. Will be back soon.

Big4 Emu Beach Holiday Park – Albany’s Coastal Gem 🏕️

Nestled just a few steps from the pristine shores of Emu Beach, BIG4 Emu Beach Holiday Park is the perfect getaway for families, couples, and road-trippers looking to explore the natural beauty of Albany, WA. Surrounded by tall peppermint trees and peaceful bushland, the park offers a serene, family-friendly environment with top-tier facilities and a welcoming community vibe.

Whether you're pulling up with a caravan, pitching a tent, or staying in a fully-equipped villa, you’ll find the accommodation clean, modern, and well-maintained. Kids will love the giant jumping pillow, shaded playground, and games room, while adults can relax with a BBQ under the gum trees or take a stroll down to the beach for a sunset walk.

🚲 Things to Love:

Direct access to Emu Beach

Spacious sites for caravans and motorhomes

Clean and modern amenities

Fully self-contained chalets and villas

Beautiful walking and cycling trails nearby

Friendly, helpful staff

A short drive to Albany’s best attractions: The Gap, Natural Bridge, Whale World, and more!

This park strikes a perfect balance between natural tranquility and family fun — a true gem on WA’s south coast. Whether you're exploring the Great Southern region or just escaping for a peaceful weekend, BIG4 Emu Beach Holiday Park is a stay you won't soon forget.

This is probably the best park that we've been to and we've stayed on sites and in cabins in many locations across Australia.
Beautifully-kept grounds, facilities and accommodation in a lovely location with plenty to see and do. Well done to management and staff.

Loved our stay here, short walk to the beach & central enough to explore all in the area. Quiet park ( outside summer & school holidays ) well laid out, very modern clean facilities.
Only negative would be quite narrow roads which could be tricky for larger vehicles to manoeuvre if park was busy.
I'm the coffee van who delivers there coffee.
We'll set out with good size sites, might be a little tight for bigger vans in peak season

I wear a full body camera for my safety and protection and I’m very happy to hand it over the the police department so they can view the abuse and bullying behaviors of Wendy also you have video surveillance aswell so you can view the footage and I really don’t like it when I have made a very serious complaint that you have victimized me for doing such so this is why the police commissioner and the minister of the wa police have been notified of this information Reported to the police commissioner of wa and the anti discrimination commission and the Thank you for contacting the Office of the Hon. Reece Whitby MLA, Minister for Police; Road Safety; Tourism; Great Southern for abuse threats and bullying discrimination of persons with disabilities and service assistance therapy dog … if I could give - 1 star I would …
Just wrapped up another stay at Big4 Emu Beach and it was every bit as good as the first time we were here. Service, amenities and overall park cleanliness are second to none.
Great value and quiet, would come back again
A great little park plenty for kids … disability bathroom and great laundry . Spacious sites .
Park very clean neat and tidy
Man, this is one nice caravan park

Wow!
Last minute detour to Albany on a Friday afternoon, I rang ahead to check availability-Laura took my call- helpful,professional & accomodating, on arrival she checked us in- Fabulous customer service,Great amenities, very clean, gardens etc. Well maintained !
THANK YOU 👍👏
Such a beautiful caravan park. Great playground and water park for children.

We stayed in the new 2 bedroom villa and it was beautiful. Perfect size and fittings throughout.
The park itself is perfect for families and has wonderful and clean amenities. We will come again
Lovely spacious powered sites, concrete pad with beautiful green grass. Dogs allowed. Close drive to town. Brilliant walking tracks  . Would stay again.
I was in a RV.   The ground were close to beach, no access to beach at the moment due to storm effected dunes. That was why we picked the place. The staff don’t seem aware of that.
Immaculate holiday park. Amenities are top notch. 20m walk to Emu Point Beach, and long trail walk/ride next to beach. Perfect location 👌
Beautiful park, gardens very nice, I would be very happy if I had the lawn we had on our site. Ablutions were modern & kept immaculate. Staff couldn’t have been any more helpful. We will be back
Great park for everyone just a little expensive the most we have paid in 8 weeks on the road, we have stayed in many like this. Still a good park though.
Booked a 2br family apartment. Modern, clean with comfortable beds. Great facilities for the kids. Would come here again.
Lovely camp kitchen and nice clean toilets
Well maintained caravan park.  Nice big sites, great splash park for the kids and quick walk thru the park to the beach.  Very nice amenities.

Wow, what a park and if you had kids it would be perfect. From the staff at reception making you feel welcome on arrival and answering any questions, nothing's a bother.
Amenities are top of the range and extremely clean.
They are proud of their park and it is manicured beautifully.
Great place to unwind for a short or long stay in a beautiful part of WA.
Well done guys keep up the great work.
Caravan sites just too small pain to get in and park your van . Shower were clean but definetly would not book on school holidays too many screaming kids .
Enjoyed the Caravan Park, green, clean and quiet, though the sites were short. Great camp kitchen
Always a good stay here. Good location and always friendly staff. Great for family stays.

Another great stay at Big4 Emu Beach.

We love this place and keep coming back!

Very family orientated, water park, Kids club, rec room, jumping pillows, mini golf you name it, great spot if you have kids.

Only small recommendation is an additional microwave or two in the camp kitchen as 1 really isn't enough.

Will be interesting to see what happens here in the future, once RAC revamps the current rose gardens caravan park located down the road, I’m sure some good competition will hopefully drop the prices of accomodation here.

Would have been a solid 5 star rating until how the issue of our site being flooded as we were put at the bottom of the hump. Rain can't be controlled but due to our stuff being destroyed n being told that if we leave we forfeit the amount of days paid, until I asked for management..... facilities are amazing and kids absolutely loved it until we had to go....... clean and tidy washrooms n the parents room made bathing the babies easier. A microwave in the parents room near the jumping pillow is a good idea for future people. Definitely coming back in summer

Well maintained
Great for kids

One of the best campsites we've stayed at. Facilities all clean and maintained, plenty to keep kids busy, hearing the waves crashing at night was amazing. Even little touches like the rosemary and chillis growing next to the camp kitchen really set this place apart. We will be back again soon.

Huge thank you to everyone at Big4 Emu Beach! The chalets are lovely, the facility's are great, and the staff are wonderful. The team were extremely accomodating and went above and beyond to help us out with extending our stay. We look forward to coming back again 😊

Very clean, we booked ensuite powered sites. Quiet with easy beach access and nice bike bath if you had a bike. Coffee shop at emu point really good coffee but pricey.The bowling club is open for meals Friday and Saturday nights.  Good nosh.
Amazing, don't stay anywhere else in Albany.

This park has all the things you would expect for the price:
Concrete slabs surrounded by lush grass
New and, immaculate and well maintained ablutions
Direct access to the beach
Staff working all day maintaining and cleaning
Jumping pillow
Playground
Mini golf
Water park

It best suits families with children but we enjoyed our stay as a couple with dogs

Situated about 8km from Albany city, but there is a Woolies complex about 3km from the park

The Squid Shack around Emu Point is a great stop for a generous serve of fish and chips.

Would definitely reccomend a stay here.  You won’t be disappointed by the park, the staff or its location!

Very nice park, great amenities clean and tidy, friendly and helpful staff. Great sites for caravan slab site power and water.
5 minute walk to the beach.

Amazing location.
Lots of room for each camping site.
Loads of activities for the kids.
Best caravan park I've ever stayed at, facilities for the kids are 10/10 ... We will 100% be back

Lovely location on Emu Beach close to walking path. We stayed in one bedroom cabin and it was tiny, the furniture was tired and uncomfortable, bed very hard, kitchen appliances adequate, TV out of the ark. The Park itself is well maintained and staff welcoming, but cabin in desperate need of refresh.

One of the best resort styled caravan parks we've stayed at! All amenities were spotlessly clean. The grounds are well-kempt. 10 out of 10 to the park staff for going the extra mile to ensure visitors having an unforgettable experience. As we we parked in the big rig area, the garden to the back was immaculately kept. We even had the priviledge of  bandicoots visiting our site, also a family of rabbits coming out during the evenings. A 5-star camp all around! Highly recommended!

The phone was answered with “Is this an emergency “ I actually thought I’d rand 000 for a moment
The receptionist was very rude and simply said they were busy and someone could call me when they were able to, no timeframe given, however by then all the accommodation would have been booked! Very rude staff and I’d say from prior reviews they definitely need retraining. Not good enough.
Cute chalets with lots of luscious surrounding plants, room was nice 👍 the shower was really squeaky and annoying though

It's an awesome place for the kids in the school holidays. Lots to do. Lovley parks/playgrounds. Bouncy pillow. Big bucket! Water Park. Pedal carts and a theatre room aswell!!! Close to the beach. Definitely a 5 ⭐. Clean and friendly staff.

Great little caravan park if you have kids.

Not so nice if you dont as the kids water park is open to ALL kids and all you hear is kids screaming all day.

Thankfully it wasnt school holidays.

Nevertheless we did enjoy our stay.

Honestly such an amazing park to stay at,access to the beach is on your doorstep and what a beautiful beach clean ,bluest of blue water
Park has lots of family friendly things to do for both kids and adults...and dog friendly
Cannot speak more highly of this place,so glad we stayed there

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

BIG4 Emu Holiday Park is a fantastic spot! Clean, well-maintained, and perfect for families. The kids had a blast, and the friendly staff made our stay even better. Highly recommended!

— CCAMP | Promoting Exploration

The reception ladies are overly rude and unhelpful. Christmas school holidays a powered tent site for 2 adults, three children $150 a night. Not sure how much it cost them to run the water park there, But aggressively yelling at my children to get off the water park because they're no longer "guests" because it past 10am check out is unprofessional and just plain unwelcoming. It doesn't cost anything extra to let my children use the water park for a little bit longer but they're attitude has cost big4 my business.
Great place to stay!

Awesome park. There is so much to do on site and the water park is awesome. Great family park and the Muncheez Pitstop Burger Van that is their during school holidays is a must to buy from. Best burgers ever

Loved our stay. We stayed on a concrete, powered site with a camper for 6 days. The sites were a good size, very well maintained, lots of shade from the trees. Great area- right next to the beach and access through to the beach path. Emu cafe up the road or middleton beach isnt far . Our child loved the water park. Such a cool idea to have - hours of entertainment ! Lots for the kids to do . We would 100% stay here again. Loved that there was a coffee van / food trucks / icecream that came also!

A premier caravan park approx 7.5km out of the Albany CBD (10-12 min drive).  This park is especially appealing to parents  with young and younger teens due to the amenities and facilities at the park aimed at the kids.  The water park and bouncing balloon are both popular with the kids and provide a lot of parent time.  a gaming room, hire trike, 2nd jumping balloon, mini golf, camp kitchens, modern clean laundries, numerous electric bbq’s, theatre room, LPG bbq bottle refills on site, video games, play grounds are just some of the reasons this venue is so popular.  The park is modern, very clean, paved gutters throughout with bitumen roads and good sized camp sites on grass with either concrete pads or ground sheets.  The ablution block is very modern and spacious and cleaned daily.  The beach is but a 2 minute walk from the park with several walkways leading to the beach.  The beach is very protected and safe for the kiddies.  Park is pet friendly as well.  Booking was very easy with professional, engaging and polite reception staff.  Middleton beach cafe a short bike ride or a 10 minute walk to the Emu Point cafe.  Highly recommend this park especially if entertaining kids is involved.  Stay well and travel safe

Dieser Park ist sehr empfehlenswert. Sanitäre Einrichtungen alles sehr sauber. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Wir haben uns dort sehr wohlgefühlt und konnte einen wunderschönen Ausflug unternehmen. Restaurants und Einkaufsmöglichkeiten sind in der Nähe.

Nice park, clean and tidy stayed in a couples cabin, clean and tidy new amenities.
But when ya want to relax and watch a movie or something,
Bad luck i think the TV is from around the turn of the century.

DVD player ??? Didn't know they still exist  lol
No smart tv or screen mirroring just the usual sad local stations..
Then no reception for that even..
Don't think it's asking too much to upgrade the TV's , considering it's $259 a night for a 5 night minimum.
Big 4 are not a mum and pop corporation.   I'm sure they could afford it.

Extremely large, great for children many different play areas for them. Had coffee van in morning's,  Wednesday night they have a burger and chips van for those who want it. Grass is green, good walking area to amenities.

We had the best week at BIG4 Emu Beach! This was our first time staying here and we were very impressed.
The facilities for the kids were so much fun, definitely something our kids will remember forever - I wish I went to a caravan park with a splash park when I was a kid! It's great that the parents can enjoy the slides too!
The jumping pillows (there is a large one and a smaller one!) were great fun for the kids, as was mini golf and the nature playground.
Super close to the beach, I loved falling asleep and waking up to the sound of the waves rolling in, something I'll miss the most!
The coffee van in the mornings was a huge hit for my husband and I.
The NYE disco was a hit with all guests of the caravan park! A great way to celebrate the new year.
The ablution block we were closest to was a bit older than the other ones but it was kept very clean and tidy.
We were also close to the smaller camp kitchen which had a sink and a BBQ and was perfect for our needs. The main camp kitchen had everything you might need for camping - microwave, huge fridge, multiple BBQ and sinks.
The park is lovely and shady, the site we were on would have been one of few that didn't get a lot of shade when the sun was at its peak but it wasn't hard to find a shady spot across the lane if we needed!
Our daughter turned 12 while we were staying here and she said it was the best birthday ever!
Reception staff, grounds staff, splahs park supervisors were all lovely and pleasant to talk to.
We asked our 3 kids (aged 12, 10 and 5) to rate our stay out of 10 and they all said 100/10. We will definitely be returning customers (if were lucky enough to get our spot again 🤞)

This is the best holiday park I've ever been to. Showers is nice big and clean with enough pressure and hot water! Nice green lawns well kept, clean. Caravan parking spots is really nice, level and well kept. Nice park, we will definitely go again. Well done! You can be proud of your park!!

Unpowered site was large and access to the beach was fantastic. Toilet cleanliness was hit and miss depending on time of day and showers were always clean. Biggest downside was the large amount of unsupervised kids running around, riding bikes and not looking where they were going. Unsure how but management need to enforce supervision much better than they do

2 stars for new facilities and clean play areas. On the down side staff are rude and short tempered. No area to sit and watch children comfortably near the play grounds. Amenities are only cleaned once a day meaning they get disgusting quickly and regularly.
Good hotel. Clean, Modern look and good location. There is also a place where you can go camping in tents. Nice place🥶🥶

This is pretty much as good as it gets for a caravan park. Immaculate grounds, 2 jumping pillows for the kids, a water park for the kids, a giant playground, a soft play indoor playground for the little ones, friendly staff and squeaky clean facilities. Thanks for another awesome break. If you don’t have a good time at this park, you’re probably the issue!

We stayed in a powered caravan site. The park itself is well maintained and clean. I love that there is a service where the grounds keeper will assist you in parking your van. However on 2 separate occasions I found 2 of the reception ladies rude and unfriendly. This is my 3rd time at this park and I’m not sure if ownership has changed as all the staff 3yrs previously were fantastic .
Chalet was very clean and beds very comfortable. Part very well cared for and perfect for kids. Ladies at reception were very friendly and accommodating. Loved our stay.
Nice park with plenty of accommodation options, lots of amenities and things to do.

Great stay for our family of 4, stayed in a family chalet. Relatively quiet, enjoyed the sound of the waves on the beach which was a short walk away. My son loved the water park and ping pong table. All round very enjoyable.
Very well maintained park with friendly staff.  Getting to be a little expensive.

Excellent park for anyone...singles, couples, families.
Excellent range of accommodation options at reasonable rates.
Very well maintained.
Great, clean facilities including communal eating area with bbqs.
Emu Beach is a great spot for sunsets and a short distance from Emu Point for excellent breakfasts, or lunches.

allocated chalet 29, brilliant location, ramp entry verse stairs which worked well.
interior was excellent, clean and well equipped.
location was great as these chalets are not crowded or cramped near others. also on dedicated access road so no passing traffic.
will be back
Great caravan park, but the barbaques dont work
Beautiful clean park with friendly staff
Beautifully kept and maintained holiday park right next to Emu Beach with nice friendly staff.
Very nice very clean ten mins from albany centre boat launching 5 mins away cabin I staid in very very nice sun comes up early in albany so if you want to sleep in where an eye cover
Einwandfreier Campingplatz! Toiletten modern und sehr sauber! Rasen top gepglegt und Personal sehr freundlich. Die Plätze sind gross und sauber. Nahe vom Beach
Great place to stay. Comfortable and cosy.Natalye greeted us when we arrived, was so friendly and helpful.Will definitely be staying again.
Amazing holiday destination for the whole clan!!!

Stayed 4 nights here with the family, great sites, facilities and location. I have been around Aus and stayed at a fair few caravan parks and must say this has to be my number one recommendation for kid friendly caravan parks. Friends also got a cabin, was affordable and they also loved it. Highly recommend this place.
Great caravan park for families with kids.
Great holiday park, amenities are plentiful and easily accessible and the beach a short stroll away. Staff are always friendly and helpful. Great vibe, we will be back.
Very well maintained and organised caravan Park. Amenities are great
Excellent

Team was super accomodating with storing a trailer. Spa room was nice and clean, beds comfy, and great possie next to the beach. Would be ideal for families with little ones, two kumping pillows and water tipper play area with slides.

Beautiful park with any amenity you could wish for. Easy beach access, walking distance to a nice cafe and beach for the kids to play on and a bike path for nice long walks. Only wish I lived closer to visit more often.
Great caravan park. Lovely location, friendly staff will visit again.
A very clean, highly organised and well set out caravan park.
Best caravan park on the South Coast.

What a disappointment. The park itself is absolutely beautiful, the staff not so much.

Came down for a family holiday (4 cabins booked) We decided we would utilise the recreational room during one of the bad weather days, and have a family afternoon playing pool, ping pong and having some lunch. Sounds like a nice plan, well one specific staff member (peppery coloured hair, short with glasses) decided she was going to make our family feel unwelcome.

She opened the door and proceeded to berate us for having food in the recreational room (there were NO signs saying no eating or drinking allowed!!) and straight off the get go had attitude and arguing with us.

While we were packing away our food and cleaning up she continued to tell us to “get out” even though she could see we were packing away. She was very very rude and didn’t consider how she was speaking to us in front of my young daughter, my niece and nephew.

If she had spoken to us with a little bit of understanding and asked nicely we would have been fine about it but the attitude she had was very very unprofessional and one I think the BIG4 corporation would find unacceptable representing their company. Another family member had a similar experience with a different staff member having attitude the day before.

Customer service is key for having your customers return. Unfortunately we will not be coming back to stay here because of this one staff members actions.

Had a run in with a very rude and aggressive lady over eating food with the family in the kitchen facilities. There were no signs or any information about not eating there. Definitely not recommended for families as she was so rude in front of my 2 children and my young neice
Very nice just a short walk to the beach
We had a great stay. Love how close it is to the beach. The cabins are great. Clean and fresh. No issues with anything. Love how family friendly the place is. Thankyou for a pleasant holiday.
Great for the kids so close to the beach walking distance and a water park inside the caravan park will come back next time I’m in Albany 🏝️☀️
Lovely Park, Helpful Kind Staff. Nice park with plenty of shady trees, great fun for the children and highly recommended

Best serviced and maintained and clean caravan park I've ever been to. Staff are just absolutely beautiful, the entertainment and stuff for children is second to none , catering for the parents while the children are playing is like nothing I've ever seen before lounge, beverages to help yourself to while watching out for your little world's is just blitz . Management are all about looking after you and your family . . It's really hard to beat the big 4 emu pt albany .cheers guys your worth your weight in gold ✨️ 👌🏻 🙌 💛

A delightful place to stay and the Albany surroundings are so beautiful. There are so many things to do and see we would have loved to have stayed longer. The caravan travellers' facilities are exemplary and the actual environment is so natural and very well-manicured. The admin staff were very accommodating. Thoroughly recommend them.
Great location, great park, lots of gardens and trees, friendly helpful staff
Going back again love it

The staff at this park are wonderful. The amenities blcok is the nicest we have ever experienced. Lovely location. Beautifuls walks beside and along the beach. Highly recommended. We had a powered site for 8 nights.
Beautiful caravan park with fantastic clean facilities. Would stay again.

What a beautiful park! Very relaxing, heaps for the kids to do and the beach is incredible.
The staff where amazing and Super friendly!!

Such a wonderful caravan park one of the best we've stayed at
Facilities so clean  and sites so green with lovely grass
A BIG THANKS to the wonderful girls and Jeff in the office for all Ur help and support after a stressful caravan accident   You were wonderful and so helpful
You guys are the best
♥️♥️♥️
Neat and tidy but packed. Direct access to beach but beach is over rated.

This is a clean and well laid out park with room for big and small units. Staff are friendly and helpful.
This is a dog friendly park and most are well behaved and friendly, but occasionally you can get a yappy neighbour.
However this is still the best park in Albany.

Lovely park, great for families in quiet suburb, walking distance to Emu point.  Loved seeing the rabbits and bandicoots every evening.
Only improvement I would make is an oven and/or gas pizza oven in camp kitchen
Great family park. Some caravan spots are a little tight but staff are most helpful.
Accomodation was caravan. Awesome staff, great service. What a great Caravan Park!

We were very impressed with the holiday park.  Our one bedroom chalet was very clean and had everything we needed.  I was delighted to discover that you could actually use the hairdryer in the bedroom where there is a plug point next to a mirror.  For once, well thought out, some top hotels don't get it right!  I loved that we were next to a little garden area and BBQ and we could sit on our own private patio for breakfast and listen to the birds, very tranquil.  I will ask for Chalet 18 next time we visit. Reception staff very friendly and helpful.  Highly recommend to stay here.

We love this place so much, every detail worked out and so so kid friendly!  My grandbabies love the splash park and boy did my legs get a workout on the cart lol.. loved it so much we booked to go again next year 👌
Very well presented and located near the beach.
Awesome place to stay, will certainly be back again. Paula is exceptional xx
Had a great stay

Definitely recommend. Lives up to the big 4 brand. Jumping pillow x 2, splash park, park, and soft play area.
Movie night was a great addition and at a good time.
Location is great! Walk straight out to the beach as well as a footpath that leads down to emu point cafe one way or Middleton beach the other.
Reception were not very welcoming but could just be the day we checked in. All paperwork was licked before handing over which was off putting considering the day and age we are in now. Everyone else was friendly, maintenance/handyman, cleaners.
Toilets were usually clean.
Can be a bit tight to turn into spots with caravans depending on how busy the park is.
Beautiful caravan park. Nice large sites, lots for the kids to do and amenities were great. Definitely will return

Beautiful location to stay and access to beaches.  Great cabin.  Neat n clean.  Would be good if porch light and dining room lights were working. Suggest a lamp please in lounge room. Children really needed a lamp in their bedroom too. Fantastic full kitchen n laundry facilities. Need a wooden spoon please. Need clothes hooks on back of door in bathroom to hang clothes please due to limited bench space and not have to use the floor. Fantastic facilities for children here.  Pity asking to pay for mini golf.  Unfair when we've paid so much already.  Was expecting a pool we saw on website but got surprised with a splash park! Need some tweeking to really be amazed and value for what we paid but really appreciate beautiful grounds well taken care of. Highly recommend.

Can't think of a reason not to stay here! Family plus extra stars- splash park, putt putt - what more could a family need! Was Very surprised by the room / cabin very up to date and not like my old school days of dirty dark cabins at all!
Good cycling tracks, clear water, beautiful coast. Foggy morning.
Fantastic facilities but very tight site. Would have had to reverse van down a dead end narrow road but luckily the site behind was empty. Beautifully maintained and fantastic position

We stayed with our caravan. Beautiful hard slab sites, with beautifully green grass around. Very well kept park, fantastic facilities and close to the water.
We will definitely be staying again later in the year 👍oh, and you can watch the rabbits and birds in the afternoon.

We were having a great stay right up until our last night. We went in to hire the pool table equipment for the games room that is open until 8 but were told we couldn’t hire the equipment as it was 6:45 and she wanted the equipment returned by 7 even though the previous 2 nights were by 8. I brought that to her attention and she responded with everyone does it different the brochure you were given states 7pm. Looking at the brochure right now I can see equipment is available to hire up until 7:30pm to return by 8pm at closing time.
This woman has put a bad taste in my mouth after her terrible customer service.

The staff members up until this point were excellent. Unfortunately it takes only 1 person to put a negative spin on what was a great holiday.
The 2 stars are for the quality service we received up until this point, the previous receptionists deserve the stars not the on on counter at 6:45pm on the 24/03/24.
We also requested a late checkout but she also wouldn’t budge on this.

At almost $400 a night and not being “trusted” to return pool table or table tennis equipment by 8pm is pretty disgraceful.

Up until now we were so keen to have this experience again. You need to reconsider the pool table equipment rules in order for guests to enjoy their evenings at this caravan park because after 7pm there’s nothing to do.

What an incredible park, the ensuite tent site was absolutely beautiful and all other facilities were maintained to such a high standard. There is no need to go anywhere for entertainment with the kids, they were absolutely thrilled with everything available within the park. The staff were helpful at all dealings, the grounds staff worked incredibly hard and it certainly pays as this is most definitely the highest standard of caravan parks we've visited yet! We will certainly be back and for longer than a weekend most definitely!

If you want a place to take young kids this would be perfect. The most expensive stay of our trip and for just the two of us not worth it because we were not going to make use of all the family friendly facilities. But I can see why it's priced that way. Great facilities and friendly people.
Great location with its own waterpark for children now.

We have been coming to this park on and off for years and we have a site we prefer where it is quiet
This time
When we booked a caravan site 9 months in advance of our arrival date we were informed that they could not guarantee we would get our normal spot but they would put us as close to it as possible , it’s important to note we had asked for quite spot
When we arrived they put right next to the camp kitchen noisy as hell
We will never come back to this park again not that they would care as it is booked out
So much for loyalty
Excellent place, wonderful helpful lady at reception (28 Feb-1 Mar). Thanks
Good caravan sites. Excellent amenities. Great water park and play areas. Very close to beach.
Stayed with caravan grounds were immaculate, facilities modern and well maintained. Felt very safe during our stay. Staff were very helpful. Would stay there next trip.

Great Park. Had the Deluxe Chalet. The water park is awesome, the grounds are perfect and the staff super helpful and courteous. Will be coming back for years to come. It would be great to be able to select movies or plug in USB or something to play in the theater room. Deluxe Chalet are not overly different to the normal chalets and are probably due soon for a refurb. The deluxe villas are amazing and we can't wait to holiday in them for years to come.

Disappointed with the hospitality of this place. We called up on the day around 1pm to book an unpowered site but were told not to worry about booking over the phone and to just book on arrival as there were many spots left. I let them know that we wouldn’t be getting in till about 4pm and they reassured me there would be availability. When we got there the lady at the front desk bluntly told us they didn’t have availability for unpowered. There was no apology or attempt to make up for their mistake. We ended up having to stay in a powered site for $66. People parked up next to us said they had an unpleasant experience with the front desk as well.
We loved our stay here. My 4yr old was thrilled with the children's facilities. Quiet location, close tot he beach, very happy with our stay here.
Awesome Caravan Park and location,  very modern and clean amenities.  The staff here are very friendly and efficient with all the maintenance ECT 😀

Our 5 night stay at BIG4 Emu Beach Holiday Park was our first trip to Albany, and our longest stay in the camper as a family of 5. We were unsure if we would be able to las the whole time, but by the end were sad it was over and would have happily stayed longer. The park is clean and very well maintained, everyone was super friendly and there were plenty of things to keep the kids occupied (bouncing pillows, water park, theatre room, go karts, recreation room, mini golf etc). Its proximity to the beach, and town was perfect as well. My only complaint........not being able to find item 3 on the parks treasure hunt!! So if someone could please let me know where it was I would appreciate it ;-).

What a fantastic park! Great for families and the water slides / bouncy pillow were the big attraction for our kids. Everything was well managed and the staff were always keen to make sure everyone was having their best time. We'll have to come back to continue exploring...

Make sure you work on your reaction skills because there are kids on bikes and scooters everywhere. My elderly mother in law was a victim to such an incident and was bruised and bloodied. Staff weren't interested at all. This is my only complaint, everything else was pretty good.

I would highly recommend this holiday park to everyone. It fulfills everyone's requirements, and if you have kids there is no better place than this.
Pros:
1. Plenty of caravan spots and options to select from (w/wo power, Water inputs etc.)
2. Decent size rooms, to suit your family needs.
We opted for King Spa Apartment, its a studio apartment with sufficient kitchen facilities.
3. Kids love this place, as there are plenty of things to do, right from Playground, Jumping Pillow, mini golf and the best of all the all new water park. You will always see kids cycling and running around.
4. Very close to Emu point beach, 2 min walk is not exaggeration.
5. Plenty and clean community toilets and bathrooms.
6. WiFi throughout the park, with good speed.

Cons:
1. Bit away from the Albany city, transport is must.
2. Not many food facilities around.
3. If you are staying in a chalet, it doesn't get serviced.

All in all, a highly recommended place if you are planning to visit Albany.

Very nice park but don’t come with young kids. Toilets are locked and the keypad is way to high preventing kids as old as 13 from going to the toilet themselves. Water park is great but worker wants you to wear green arm bands all the time. Understand the need for security but you need to NOT inconvenience guests,
Great Sites and plenty of activities for the kids

We stayed for a week in December 2023. This is a fantastic park for young families with great facilities for kids. It was a bit noisy and congested for grey nomads like us, but overall, a lovely park in a beautiful location.
Pleasure to stay here, kids were busy and entertained the entire time.  Bikes were handy to have exploring Emu Point & Middleton Beach and for getting around the Big4 Park.
We had a great stay, a park the team take a lot of pride in presenting well. Loved it.
Place amazing last year went there this year I contacted them to booking was fully booked disappointed, it was my fault because call them late
Great place,we stayed at the deluxe villa and given that they are new...pretty impressive, what you expect for the cost..

We had so much fun, we stayed for 7 days and really regretted not booking for longer. Awesome park for the kids and adults. The staff were so friendly and helpful in everyway. We will see you soon BIG4 Emu Beach
Friendly staff, grounds beautifully kept, lots for kids to do,emenities lovely and clean.
is fantastic! Great facilities, friendly staff, and a perfect blend of nature and comfort. Highly recommended for a memorable getaway.
Pleasant staff happy to help if needed.
Our favourite camping in Australia

Would have given 5 if it wasn't for the smoke taint in the room and cost if washing machines.

Legends in the park let us have boat in side in vacant block for 2 nights. Cheers fellas.
Excellent caravan park. Beautiful manicured gardens. Awesome chalets. Beach right on the doorstep

Great place to stay. Friendly staff, relaxing, clean and well maintained inside and out.
Will happily stay there again.
Only slight negative is size of chalet bathrooms. They're a bit cramped.
Fantastic kids water park and sizeable kids playground. Facilities are very clean and kept in excellent condition
Amazing facilities, very clean, friendly staff
Good park for kids,have a lot of facilities to keep the kids occupied.
Fabulous accommodation.  Grandkids love the amenities.   Clean, comfortable, beautifully appointed, perfect holiday rental. Everything you need for meal prep etc

Showers & toilets are spotless
BBQs and outside sink are clean
Laundry is also very clean

I would definitely recommend this property if you have children! Bouncy pillow, water slide park, a little kitchen so you can make yourself a hot drink while watching your children! Also a playground too! Will definitely be staying here again. The delux cabins look amazing, we are on a powered site and it is only 1 minute away from the toilets which is amazing and handy with small children. Also allowed us to have our pooch! The beach is just a 5 minute walk (if that) through the path with a variety of shells and lots of space for the children to explore.
Nice place for our stay in our caravan, park very tidy, ablutions etc clean, staff friendly and helpful, nice and close to the beach, definitely worth a visit again.☺️

WE LOVED IT🤩 (despite the rain)
We stayed on a powered site in a camper with the kids.
All the facilities were clean & well maintained, plenty for the kids to do & only a few minutes walk to the beach.
If we are ever holidaying down this way again we will chose to stay here.
Awesome park. The layout is fantadtic. Huge caravan sites. The amenities are the best I have ever seen anywhere on our travels. Would recommend highly
Really reasonable price and beautiful place. There are so many activities available in the park for both kids and adults. The kids really enjoyed the stay.

Stayed in a self-contained unit for two nights, modern and well-appointed. We even had a New Holland Honeyeater nesting in a shrub outside of the kitchen window. The park itself is very well maintained with busy workers carrying out maintenance  around the grounds. The water activity area (not operating while we were  there in August) and games room would be a big hit if you had kids with you. We used the free BBQ, which was clean and conveniently located near the unit.
Short walk to the beach and walking tracks.
Great place to stay
Very comfortable beds, very clean great position with only a short walk to views of the ocean and a path that led down to Emu Point Cafe
Beautiful, quiet so close to the beach and wonderful things for kids and adults to do. Friendly and just perfect
Peaceful and quiet this time of year. Would love to have been able to use lounge facility before 8 am. As spouse asleep and I can't turn on the light in the room to read and I was up by 6.
Nice quite park, though it is July and outside school holidays. Easy access to dog friendly beach
Brilliant caravan park, ensuite was first rate and facilities were all top shelf.
Great facilities, friendly service and right next to the beach. We went for WA day long holiday and the place was very busy, clearly quite popular.
Loved it. The spa apartment was a treat. Caution, Beware of the limestone pillars in the carpark!

Beautiful well maintained park with lovely clean amenities..it was our second stay there and would definitely stay again on our return trip.
Must book in advance in peak season as they are always very busy.

Stayed here for 2 weeks & very impressed with everything.  The amenities are spotless & the staff are seen daily performing their duties & very friendly. Prices OK & a short walk to the beach. Heaps of fun for the kids incl. jumping pillow & even a water park.
